workflowsPageDescription: Manage dynamic approval workflow definitions by document type.
workflowListSubtitle: Active and inactive approval definitions appear here.
createWorkflowSubtitle: Define steps and conditions with row-based editors.
workflowDetailSubtitle: Update steps and conditions of the selected record.
workflowStatusHelp: Inactive workflows are ignored during resolution.
emptyWorkflowDescription: No approval definition has been added yet.
noWorkflowSelectedDescription: Select a record from the list to view details.
resolverSubtitle: Test which workflow is selected for the given payload.
stepsEditorDescription: Define approval levels with order, approver type and requirement rules.
conditionsEditorDescription: Define field-based conditions that affect workflow selection.
noConditionsConfigured: No conditions defined for this workflow yet.
inboxPageDescription: Manage pending approval steps assigned to the current user.
pendingListSubtitle: Pending steps assigned to you are listed here.
emptyPendingDescription: There are no approval items to show in the inbox.
decisionPanelSubtitle: Submit a decision and review history for the selected approval instance.
viewApprovalQueue: Monitor pending and active approval steps.
noApprovalSelectedDescription: Open a pending record from the list on the left.
delegationsPageDescription: Define authority handover for a workflow or all scopes.
delegationListSubtitle: Active and inactive delegation records appear here.
createDelegationSubtitle: Enter delegator, delegate and scope information.
emptyDelegationDescription: No delegation record has been defined yet.
